sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94494" key="skalabw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκᾰλᾰβώτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, later form for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀσκαλαβώτης</foreign>, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.12</biblScope> </bibl> (s. v.l.).</entryFree>
